Plaintiff Kayla Jennings, Michael Johnson'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission (Tentative Rulings Only Part 2 Of 2)
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty.Kirill B. Tarasenko of Tarasenko Law 888-878-0830 ext.1 CourtCall appearance for plaintiff. Atty. N. Rebecca A. Turner of Law Offices of Gilsleider, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan 925-446-3115 appeared for defendant.

Argued, after the discussion The Court adopted its tentative ruling with the following modifications - PLAINTIFFs KAYLA JENNINGS, MICHAEL JOHNSON Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission. Defendant shall serve further verified responses by March 28, 2019 by E-service. Sanctions in the amount of $1,500 are awarded against defendant and paid by April 8, 2019. Plaintiff to prepare the order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem Melinda Derish, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission
Off Calendar Feb-05-2019 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kirill Tarasenko, esq. (888-878-0830 x1) for Plaintiffs KAYLA JENNINGS and MICHAEL JOHNSON via court call.
N. Rebecca Turner, esq. (925-446-3115) of Gilsleider, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs KAYLA JENNINGS and MICHAEL JOHNSON's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission

Continued to March 5 ,2019 at 9:00am, Dept 302, Discovery. Defendant, Mr. Mock to e-serve any further responses to the requests for admissions by February 19, 2019, to be accompanied by his signed verification. The parties to each file a letter brief of two pages or less by February 26, 2019. The letter brief to address trial status, good cause to complete discovery under CCP sec. 1141.24, and any further responses by Mr. Mock.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda T. Derish, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
